creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186785
DSDT file for HP EliteBook 9470m

On my HP EliteBook 9470m, the Synaptics touchpad is detected as a Generic PS/2 Mouse.

dmesg snippet:

psm0: <PS/2 Mouse> irq 12 on atkbdc0
psm0: [GIANT-LOCKED]
psm0: model Generic PS/2 mouse, device ID 0

This is similar to Bug 214480 about the 2570p (I no longer have that laptop), except that the 9470m detects the touchpad as a Generic PS/2 Mouse.

The DSDT file is attached.
